mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.DEPT_NAME, p.POSITION_NAME, p.POSITION_RANK FROM EMPLOYEE e LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.DEPT_ID = d.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION p ON e.POSITION_ID = p.POSITION_ID WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_ID = #{employeeId}
SELECT DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME FROM DEPARTMENT ORDER BY DEPT_NAME

SELECT e.EMPLOYEE_ID, e.EMPLOYEE_NO, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME, e.EMPLOYEE_ROLE, e.EMPLOYEE_PHONE, e.EMPLOYEE_EMAIL, e.PROFILE_IMG, e.EMPLOYEE_STATUS, d.DEPT_NAME, p.POSITION_NAME FROM EMPLOYEE e
LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON d.DEPT_ID = e.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN `POSITION` p ON p.POSITION_ID = e.POSITION_ID
WHERE e.EMPLOYEE_STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
AND e.DEPT_ID = #{deptId}
ORDER BY p.POSITION_RANK, e.EMPLOYEE_NAME

SELECT e.*, d.DEPT_NAME, p.POSITION_NAME, p.POSITION_RANK FROM EMPLOYEE e LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON e.DEPT_ID = d.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION p ON e.POSITION_ID = p.POSITION_ID
AND e.EMPLOYEE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY e.EMPLOYEE_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE (EMPLOYEE_NO, EMPLOYEE_PWD, EMPLOYEE_NAME, DEPT_ID, POSITION_ID, EMPLOYEE_PHONE, EMPLOYEE_EMAIL, HIRE_DATE) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, #{employeePwd}, #{employeeName}, #{deptId}, #{positionId}, #{employeePhone}, #{employeeEmail}, #{hireDate})
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(EMPLOYEE_NO) FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMPLOYEE_NO LIKE CONCAT(#{year}, '___')
